title: Operating Systems: Three Easy Pieces
textbook_refs: Arpaci-Dusseau: Operating Systems: Three Easy Pieces
Silberschatz, Galvin, Gagne: Operating System Concepts 10th Ed
Tanenbaum & Bos: Modern Operating Systems 5th Ed

topics.title: OS History and Structure: Monolithic, Microkernel, and Hybrid Architectures
System Calls and OS API: User Mode, Kernel Mode, and Trap Mechanism
Process Creation: fork(), exec(), wait(), and Process Lifecycle
Threads and Concurrency: POSIX Threads, Thread Models, and Concurrency Hazards
Inter-Process Communication: Pipes, FIFOs, Message Queues, Shared Memory, Sockets
Mutex, Semaphores, and Monitors: Classical Synchronization Primitives
Classical Synchronization Problems: Producer-Consumer, Readers-Writers, Dining Philosophers
Condition Variables: Mesa vs Hoare Semantics and Spurious Wakeups
Lock-Free Data Structures: CAS Operations, ABA Problem, and Memory Ordering
CPU Scheduling Algorithms: FCFS, SJF, SRTF, Round Robin, Multilevel Queues
Real-Time Scheduling: EDF, RMS, and Hard vs Soft Real-Time Constraints
Multiprocessor and Gang Scheduling: Load Balancing and CPU Affinity
Deadlock Detection and Recovery: Resource Allocation Graphs and Banker's Algorithm
Paging and Segmentation: Address Translation, Page Tables, and Segfaults
TLB and Multi-Level Page Tables: CR3 Register, ASID, and Inverted Page Tables
Page Replacement Algorithms: FIFO, LRU, Clock, Working Set, and Thrashing
Demand Paging and Copy-on-Write: mmap(), Memory-Mapped Files, and Swapping
Memory Allocators: Buddy System, Slab Allocator, and dlmalloc Internals
File System Implementation: Inodes, Directory Structure, and Block Allocation
Directory Structures: Tree, Acyclic Graph, and Hard Links vs Symbolic Links
Journaling and Log-Structured File Systems: Crash Consistency and Ext4/ZFS
Disk Scheduling: FCFS, SSTF, SCAN, C-SCAN, and Look Algorithms
I/O Subsystem: Device Drivers, IRQs, DMA, and I/O Schedulers
Linux Kernel Internals: Process Scheduler, VFS Layer, and Kernel Modules
Windows OS Architecture: NT Kernel, HAL, Win32 API, and Registry
Boot Process: BIOS/UEFI, GRUB, Kernel Initialization, and init/systemd
Virtualization: Type-1/Type-2 Hypervisors, KVM, VMware, and Paravirtualization
Containers and Namespaces: Linux cgroups, namespaces, Docker, and OCI
OS Security: Access Control, Capabilities, SELinux, and Privilege Escalation
Memory Reclamation: Garbage Collection in OS Context and RCU Mechanism
Distributed OS Concepts: Remote Procedure Calls, Distributed Shared Memory
Placement Guide: OS Interview Questions, GATE Preparation, and Kernel Programming
